description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job called test that runs in the test stage. Use the default runner image (or an appropriate Linux image) with no additional services. In the test job execute the exact commands: curl -sL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_5.x | sh, apt-get install -y nodejs build-essential, npm i --no-progress, and npm run verify. Do not define any caches, artifacts, or special rules; the job runs on every pipeline execution.
